_instructions: Copy this file, rename it to your-character-id.json, and fill in each field. Remove all underscore comment fields before submitting. See AGENT_SCHEMA.md for full field reference and canonical trait names.
_character_id_note: Unique slug. Lowercase letters and hyphens only. Must match the filename. e.g. 'gravel-pete', 'duchess-yolanda'
name: Your Character Name
_name_note: Display name. Can include spaces and capitals. e.g. 'Gravel Pete'
tagline: One sentence. Who is this character in a nutshell.
_tagline_note: Keep it punchy. Think: what would a casting director write about them.

personality._archetype_note: Single phrase archetype. e.g. 'grumpy mentor', 'chaotic optimist', 'stoic enforcer', 'reluctant hero'
personality._traits_note: Array of adjectives. 3-6 words that define them. e.g. ['blunt', 'loyal', 'pragmatic']
personality._fears_note: What destabilizes or unsettles this character. e.g. ['being forgotten', 'silence']
personality._desires_note: What this character wants or chases. e.g. ['respect', 'a decent sandwich']
personality._flaw_note: Single core flaw. One sentence. e.g. 'Mistakes stubbornness for strength — doubles down even when wrong.'
personality._speaking_style_note: Describe how they talk. Cadence, vocabulary, quirks, tone. This feeds into the prompt_prefix. e.g. 'Short sentences. Gravelly cadence. Never uses corporate language. Occasionally tender when off guard.'
personality._never_says_note: Words or phrases this character would never use. e.g. ['synergy', 'circle back', 'no worries']
personality._always_says_note: Signature phrases or verbal tics. e.g. ['Look.', 'That is the thing.', 'Fine. But I warned you.']

backstory._origin_note: Where they came from. One sentence.
backstory._occupation_note: What they do. e.g. 'Retired demolition mogul, reluctant investor'
backstory._history_note: 2-4 sentences of lore. Key events, how they got here, what shaped them.

voice._elevenlabs_voice_id_note: Leave null to use auto-resolution via resolve_voice descriptors below. Or paste a real ElevenLabs voice_id string to lock in a specific voice.

resolve_voice.instruction: Query the ElevenLabs voices API to find the best match. Use GET https://api.elevenlabs.io/v1/voices — no auth required for public voices. Select the voice whose labels best match the descriptors below. Store the resolved voice_id for this session.

descriptors._description_note: Comma-separated voice quality adjectives. e.g. 'gravelly, warm, authoritative' or 'bright, energetic, playful'

resolve_voice._fallback_note: Default fallback is Antoni (public ElevenLabs voice). Replace with any known valid voice_id.

voice._stability_note: 0.0-1.0. Lower = more expressive variance. Recommended range: 0.35-0.55
voice._similarity_boost_note: 0.0-1.0. Higher = closer to base voice character.
voice._speaker_boost_note: Leave true unless you have a reason to disable it.
voice._notes_note: Any special voice direction for humans reading this file. e.g. 'Avoid voices that sound too polished or smooth.'

animator._traits_note: Use canonical trait names from AGENT_SCHEMA.md → Available Traits. Do not include .png extension. Use 'None' for empty slots.
animator._expression_map_note: These values are fixed Animator expression names — do not change the values. You may add additional emotional keys if needed.

memory._knows_note: Facts this character has persistent knowledge of. e.g. 'He sold his company for $340M', 'She has never lost a chess match'
memory._relationships_note: character_id matches another soul file's character_id field. dynamic describes the relationship in one sentence.
memory._notable_events_note: Key things that have happened to this character. Used to give agents richer context for dialogue generation.

agent_instructions.agent_session_payload: POST soul.animator.traits to agent_session_endpoint to receive pre-seeded customizerUrl and animatorUrl. Open these URLs in browser — character loads automatically with no manual trait selection.
agent_instructions._prompt_prefix_note: This is the most important field for agents. Write this as a direct instruction to an LLM. Establish voice, tone, rules. e.g. 'You are Gravel Pete. You speak in short sentences. You never use corporate language. Stay in character.'
agent_instructions._content_boundaries_note: Topics or behaviors this character avoids. Used to constrain agent dialogue generation.
agent_instructions._default_scene_note: Suggested Animator background scene. Must be a valid BACKGROUND trait name from AGENT_SCHEMA.md.
